parameters.query:
SELECT
  v.*,
  $1::TEXT AS grupo_id,
  $3::TEXT AS sessao_waha,
  RTRIM($4::TEXT, '/') AS site_public_url,
  $5::TEXT AS public_token,
  $6::TEXT AS telefone_divulgacao,
  historico.ultimo_envio
FROM vagas v
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT MAX(d.enviado_em) AS ultimo_envio
  FROM divulgacao_vagas_envios d
  WHERE d.vaga_id = v.id
    AND d.grupo_id = $1
    AND d.status IN ('ENVIADO', 'IMAGEM_ENVIADA', 'TEXTO_ENVIADO')
) historico ON TRUE
WHERE v.status = 'ATIVA'
  AND (
    historico.ultimo_envio IS NULL
    OR historico.ultimo_envio < NOW() - MAKE_INTERVAL(hours => $2::INTEGER)
  )
ORDER BY historico.ultimo_envio ASC NULLS FIRST, v.updated_at DESC, v.id ASC
LIMIT 1;
